name: Carole's Pasta Salad with Basil Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the garlic cloves and dried basil until combined.
2. Add the sugar, dry mustard, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, salt, and black pepper to the bowl with the garlic and dried basil. Mix well.
3. Slowly pour in the olive oil while continuously whisking to emulsify the dressing.
4. Once the dressing is smooth and well combined, add it to the pasta salad and toss until evenly coated.
